articles.title: Santa Cruz Co.: County To Expand Use Of A.I. In Workforce, County Website

articles.title: OpenClaw Insider Builds the Enterprise Safety Layer the Project Never Shipped
articles.description: Red Hat principal engineer and OpenClaw maintainer Sally O'Malley released Tank OS—a tool that sandboxes AI agents in isolated containers, keeping credentials locked and agents from interfering with each other or the host machine.
articles.content: Red Hat principal software engineer Sally O'Malley spent a weekend solving a problem most enterprise IT teams don't know they have yet. The result is Tank OS, an open-source tool that packages OpenClaw—the hot new software that makes it easy to deplo... [2749 chars]
